mapper.select: SELECT b.board_seq AS boardSeq, b.user_seq AS userSeq, b.board_type AS boardType, b.cs_type AS csType, b.title, b.content, b.views, b.created_at AS createdAt, u.name AS authorName FROM boards b LEFT JOIN users u ON b.user_seq = u.user_seq WHERE b.board_type = #{boardType} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC

SELECT b.board_seq AS boardSeq, b.user_seq AS userSeq, b.board_type AS boardType, b.cs_type AS csType, b.title, b.content, b.views, b.created_at AS createdAt FROM boards b WHERE b.board_type = 'CS' AND b.user_seq = #{userSeq} ORDER BY b.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boards ( user_seq, board_type, cs_type, title, content, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userSeq}, 'CS', #{csType}, #{title}, #{content}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
